---
title: Descriptive Analysis of f75 Milk Formula
output: html_document
---

```{r, config, include=FALSE}
sex_called <- Sys.getenv("R_CONFIG_ACTIVE")
config_list <- config::get(
  config = sex_called
)
```

```{r, here-i-am, include = FALSE}
here::i_am(
  "report_midterm.Rmd"
)
```


## Characteristics of the full cohort are displayed in table one.
```{r, load-table-one, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE}
table_one <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/table_one.rds")
)

table_one
```


## Boxplot that shows changes in `r config_list$s` MUAC from baseline to endlines across arms.
```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE}
boxplot <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/boxplot.rds")
)
boxplot
```


## Linear regression model that predicts change in `r config_list$s` MUAC by arm.
```{r, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE}
regression_table <- readRDS(
  here::here("output/regression_table.rds")
)

regression_table

```
